_comment: Spec-derived manifest (cliwright GOAL.md §0/§11). DERIVED from the ENUMERATED n8n public API v1 OpenAPI (the per-endpoint path specs under packages/cli/src/public-api/v1/handlers/**/spec/paths/*.yml), NOT model recall. scripts/spec-completeness.sh proves this manifest covers >= API_COVERAGE_MIN% of api_method_total (completeness).
_completeness_comment: api_method_total = the COUNT of operations (x-eov-operation-id) enumerated from api_method_source across all 49 path specs on n8n master (2026-06-30). Covered = sum of resources[].verbs (+ methods[]). Below API_COVERAGE_MIN with no coverage-waiver in DECISIONS.md fails spec-completeness.sh. Current: 60/80 = 75% -> waived (see DECISIONS.md); the uncovered 20 are the newest/enterprise-gated surfaces (data-table columns, folders, insights, discover, community-packages, execution tags, workflow version, credential test).
_profile_comment: profile_flag/profile_noun name the multi-instance selector so it reads naturally: an n8nctl profile IS one n8n instance, so the user-facing flag is --instance. --profile stays as a HIDDEN back-compat alias (commands/root.go).
_methods_comment: n8n's public API is REST-shaped, so everything maps to resources[] above; no flat RPC-style methods to list.
